title: antidesma tomentosum
intro: Antidesma tomentosum is a species of plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as the hairy velvet-back or hairy velvet tree. It is traditionally used in folk medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving digestive issues, due to its flavonoid and phenolic content. In herbal preparations, Antidesma tomentosum is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
